channel.title: Blogs on Zirui Li
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Zirui Li

item.title: Multi Label Classification Using Pattern Exploiting Training
item.description: Introduction As the years go by, larger models, with billions of parameters are being trained to achieve remarkable few-shot performance. However, training these models requires an enormous amount of compute, which results in a large carbon footprint. In this, we try to use a smaller model to perform multilabel classification, through prompt engineering. Pattern Exploiting Training We start with a brief introduction to Pattern Exploiting Training(PET). PET is a semi-supervised training method, it reformulates input as cloze questions to help language models better understand the semantics.
